verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $44.92 CAD. Core is 10.0% vs 40% target — $1,872 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.9%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: PLTR above zone; SOFI above zone.

buckets.notes: CEG, ETN, GEV, OSS, PWR, SOFI — held, not added to. Shrink by dilution.

buckets.notes: Dry powder for red days / limit orders.

warnings: UNDER-DIVERSIFIED: XEQT core is 10.0% vs 40% target (30.0pp below). Prioritize funding core.
THEME CONCENTRATION: Single-theme (AI/power/nuclear) exposure at 89.9% — above 50% threshold.
SOFI: only $3.10 CAD room to cap — too small for a meaningful buy.
